initial_req: I need an instant messaging application for real-time communication between users.
I need an instant messaging application for real-time communication between users.

history.question: Beyond basic text messaging, what communication features do you expect users to need — such as group chats, file/media sharing, voice/video calls, message reactions, or read receipts?
history.answer: I expect to add friends and create groups to connect with other users. I also expect to send text, images, videos, and files to share various forms of content. Additionally, I expect to make voice calls and video calls to communicate via audio and video.
